title: robertia decandra
intro: Robertia decandra, also known as Indian gentian or gentianella, is a plant species that belongs to the gentian family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Robertia decandra include its ability to improve liver function, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
